top_risks: TS-QA-EMAIL-001: Cross-Project Tracking — Log in main project, pixel calls separate project rhnhhjidsnrlwxtbarvf. Tracking may be silently broken if secondary project SUPABASE_URL is misconfigured.
TS-QA-EMAIL-002: email_log RLS TO public — anon users can read ALL email_log rows (recipient emails, subjects). Fix: restrict SELECT to authenticated/admin.
TS-QA-DEP-001: xlsx Prototype Pollution + ReDoS (no fix available) — no immediate exploit vector found in current usage
next_steps: 1. Verify rhnhhjidsnrlwxtbarvf project secrets: SUPABASE_URL must point to main project osgrjouxwpnokfvzztji
2. Apply email_log RLS fix: restrict SELECT TO authenticated WHERE role IN (admin, teacher)
3. Harden SMTP: tls.rejectUnauthorized = true in send-email/index.ts
4. Clarify agent_log table existence and RLS status in Supabase dashboard
